task.title: Decorate a House for Halloween
task.shortdesc: This task describes how to decorate a house for Halloween using indoor and outdoor decorations.

context.p: Halloween decorations can range from simple seasonal accents to elaborate themed displays. This task focuses on common household decorations.

step.cmd: Decorate the exterior of the house.

substep.cmd: Place decorations near the front entrance.
Add lighting along walkways or porches.
Position yard decorations where they are clearly visible.

info.p: Focus on areas where guests are most likely to gather.

stepxmp.p: Hang themed decorations on walls, place decorative items on tables, and use seasonal textiles such as cushions or tablecloths.

messagepanel.consequence: May result in injury or property damage.
messagepanel.howtoavoid: Use indoor/outdoor-rated lights and inspect cords before use.

step.cmd: Test all lights and electrical decorations.

result.p: The house is decorated for Halloween and ready for visitors.
